meta.name: Akatsuki Shop Items – Forbidden Market
meta.description: Cosmetic and functional items for the Akatsuki PhD Quest shop. Includes cloaks, masks, companions, accessories, buffs, and rare artifacts.

items.name: Akatsuki Cloak
items.cosmeticEffect: Adds the classic black cloak with red clouds.
items.functionalEffect: +5% XP on all missions for 24 hours after purchase.
items.description: The signature cloak of the rogue scholars.

items.name: Elite Akatsuki Cloak
items.cosmeticEffect: Enhanced cloak with glowing crimson clouds.
items.description: Reserved for those who walk the path of mastery.

items.name: Shadow Scholar Cloak
items.cosmeticEffect: Dark gradient cloak with subtle runes.
items.description: Worn by those who study in silence.

items.name: ANBU Mask
items.functionalEffect: +5% success chance on Deep Work missions.
items.description: A mask worn by elite operatives.

items.name: Oni Mask
items.cosmeticEffect: Adds a red demon mask with horns.

items.name: Akatsuki Ring
items.cosmeticEffect: Adds a glowing ring to the avatar’s hand.
items.description: Each ring holds a secret meaning.

items.name: Scroll Satchel
items.cosmeticEffect: Adds a scroll bag to the avatar’s side.
items.description: A satchel filled with ancient scrolls.

items.name: Focus Charm
items.cosmeticEffect: Adds a glowing charm around the neck.
items.description: A charm that sharpens the mind.

items.name: Summon Raven Companion
items.cosmeticEffect: A raven perches on your avatar’s shoulder.
items.description: A loyal messenger of the shadows.

items.name: Shadow Wolf
items.cosmeticEffect: A spectral wolf follows your avatar.
items.functionalEffect: +10% XP on all missions for 24 hours.
items.description: A guardian spirit forged from moonlight.

items.name: Crimson Aura
items.cosmeticEffect: Red energy aura around the avatar.

items.name: Midnight Aura
items.cosmeticEffect: Dark blue aura with drifting particles.
items.description: A calm aura for late-night scholars.

items.name: Hydra Fang
items.cosmeticEffect: Adds a glowing fang to your inventory display.
items.description: A relic from the defeated Literature Hydra.

items.name: Golem Core
items.cosmeticEffect: Adds a floating stone core behind the avatar.
items.description: A core fragment from the Methodology Golem.

items.name: Focus Potion
items.description: A small boost for tough days.

items.name: XP Scroll
items.functionalEffect: +10% XP for the next mission only.
items.description: A scroll infused with ancient knowledge.
